de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionVariableExtractor.StateExecutionVariable

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionVariable
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionVariableExtractor.StateExecutionVariable
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionVariable
    Enclosing class:
    ExecutionVariableExtractor

    private class ExecutionVariableExtractor.StateExecutionVariable
extends AbstractExecutionVariable
    The IExecutionVariable instantiated by the ExecutionVariableExtractor.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Detail

      • values

        private IExecutionValue[] values
        The contained IExecutionValues.

    • Constructor Detail

      • StateExecutionVariable

        public StateExecutionVariable(IExecutionNode<?> parentNode,
                              Node proofNode,
                              PosInOccurrence modalityPIO,
                              IProgramVariable programVariable,
                              Term arrayIndex,
                              Term additionalCondition)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        parentNode - The IExecutionNode providing relevant information.
        proofNode - The Node of KeY's proof tree which is represented by this IExecutionNode.
        modalityPIO - The PosInOccurrence of the modality of interest.
        programVariable - The represented IProgramVariable which value is shown.
        arrayIndex - The index in the parent array.
        additionalCondition - An optional additional condition to consider.

    • Method Detail

      • getValues

        public IExecutionValue[] getValues()
                            throws ProofInputException
        Returns the possible values of this IExecutionVariable.
        Returns:
        The possible values of this IExecutionVariable.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • createSelectTerm

        public Term createSelectTerm()
        Creates recursive a term which can be used to determine the value of IExecutionVariable.getProgramVariable().
        Returns:
        The created term.
